problem id: dc99f250
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11011100 -> 00000011
  11001101 -> 10000011
  01110101 -> 10000001
  00001101 -> 10000000
  11011010 -> 00000011
  01100110 -> 00000001
  01101010 -> 00000001
  01001111 -> 10000001

query: 10001010
predicted answer: 00000010
